description_long: This object is a lever-action shotgun with a long, blued steel barrel and a wooden full stock. The stock features a visible shell holder on the side, likely for quick reloading, and a leather sling is attached for carrying. The receiver and action are made of dark metal, contrasting with the rich brown wood of the stock and fore-end. The lever loop is prominent beneath the receiver, indicating the action type. The barrel is round and extends significantly from the receiver, with no visible ribbing or venting. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for both practical use and display.
description: A lever-action shotgun with a long blued barrel, wooden full stock, and attached leather sling. Features a shell holder on the stock and a prominent lever loop.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the wooden stock with shell holder, and the attached leather sling.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length, wooden stock, and sling, with the lever and trigger guard visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, showing the shell holder and sling attachment.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long round barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
